title: Properties and Convergence of a Regular Stochastic Matrix
description: A flowchart illustrating the defining properties of a Regular Stochastic Matrix and the guaranteed outcome of its convergence to a steady-state vector.
relationships: v₀ is multiplied by P to create a state sequence
P is a stochastic matrix where some power Pⁿ has only positive entries
As n → ∞, Pⁿ converges to a matrix with identical rows
Each row of the limit matrix is the steady-state vector π
π is the unique probability vector satisfying the equation π = πP
